channel.title: Anto Subash - no-layers
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: Removing IdentityServer from ABP No Layer Template
item.description: In this post we will see how to remove identity server from the No Layer ABP template

item.title: Introduction to ABP No Layer Template
item.description: In this post we will explore the new experimental no layer template from the ABP framework
